Downloading Content from Xbox Live

Xbox Live provides your titles with the ability to download content and add it to the game. This overview presents the resons for supporting downloadable content, as well as the methods fo doing so.

  • Introducing Content Download
  • Building Content Download Packages
  • Content Download Manager
  • Finding New Content
  • Purchasing and Canceling Offerings
  • Downloading, Installing, and Removing Content Packages
